aggregate_boundary: Aggregate cement pathway methods own kiln fuels electricity final grinding and calcination only while the aggregate representation is selected.
required_decomposed_owner: The active decomposition child roles replace parent direct methods for cement output coverage.
forbidden_double_counting_signal: Aggregate make_cement_equivalent pathway rows active in the same solve request as cement decomposition child rows.
validation_expectation: A solve request with make_cement_equivalent__clinker_decomposition must contain no make_cement_equivalent__pathway_bundle rows.
notes: Prevents aggregate heat fuel and process coefficients from being counted alongside decomposed child coefficients.

aggregate_boundary: Aggregate cement methods carry host-specific kiln fuel and electricity inputs directly on the cement-equivalent row.
required_decomposed_owner: generate_cement_kiln_heat owns host-specific cement kiln fuel inputs and direct combustion emissions in the decomposed branch.
forbidden_double_counting_signal: deliver_high_temperature_heat or aggregate cement fuel inputs active for the same decomposed cement output.
validation_expectation: Decomposed clinker rows consume cement_kiln_heat while kiln heat rows own direct fuel inputs and energy emissions.
notes: Keeps host-owned cement kiln heat out of generic industrial heat demand and out of the aggregate parent when decomposed.

aggregate_boundary: Aggregate cement methods carry clinker calcination process emissions on a cement-equivalent basis.
required_decomposed_owner: make_clinker_intermediate owns limestone calcination and uncaptured clinker process emissions in the decomposed branch.
forbidden_double_counting_signal: Aggregate cement process emissions or final cement process emissions active alongside clinker process rows.
validation_expectation: Clinker rows carry process emissions and no direct fuel-combustion emissions; kiln and finish rows carry no process emissions.
notes: Keeps calcination CO2 in one physical location after decomposition.

aggregate_boundary: Aggregate cement methods carry final grinding blending electricity and clinker substitution on the cement-equivalent row.
required_decomposed_owner: grind_blend_cement_equivalent owns the final product boundary and consumes clinker and electricity only.
forbidden_double_counting_signal: Final grinding rows carrying clinker calcination or kiln fuel direct emissions.
validation_expectation: Finish rows consume make_clinker_intermediate and electricity but carry no direct process or fuel-combustion emissions.
notes: Keeps final cement-equivalent output from recreating upstream clinker or kiln heat emissions.
